summary: Classified #85202 as the live canonical non-security bug report and kept it open. Routed the linked open PR #85543 to central security handling because the hydrated artifact marks it security-sensitive and labels it as a security-boundary merge risk. No close, merge, or fix-PR actions are planned because the canonical issue remains open, the only hydrated fix candidate is quarantined, and this job blocks fix and merge actions.

actions.reason: #85202 is the best surviving canonical issue for this root cause and should remain open until a reviewed, non-quarantined fix path lands.

The PR touches an exec-adjacent security-boundary surface and is explicitly marked security-sensitive in the hydrated artifact, so it must be routed to central OpenClaw security triage instead of ProjectClownfish backlog automation.
